name: Campbell Soup - Roast Pork Party-Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Make 6 slits almost to the bone in the pork loin.
2. Place a slice of onion and apple in each slit.
3. Rub the roast with sage.
4. Tie securely.
5. Roast fat side up at 325°F for 2 hours; pour off any rendered fat.
6. Combine the soup and sherry, then pour over the meat.
7. Continue roasting for an additional 30 minutes or until fully cooked, basting often (total roasting time is 35-40 minutes per pound).
8. Remove the meat from the pan.
9. In a roasting pan on top of the range, add water to the soup and heat, stirring, to loosen any browned bits.
10. Serve with the roast.
